reviews.review_text: Enjoyed our stay

Great location.
All the amenities you would expect.
No issues
Great place to stay we paid extra for the beach view was awesome but on the 2nd last day a big motorhome come in and parked right across our view plus they had a dog and I thought you not aloud dogs
Camp ground is well maintained with clean amenities.  Staff very helpful and easy going.  Right on the beach and next to slsc.  Eating places across the road.  Great location.
Great spot and location. Neat and tidy grounds and the toilet/shower facilities were kept clean.  Easy access to a bit of grocery shopping , butcher shop and takeaways if needed.

I would give this place a zero if I could. The women’s toilets had poo smeared in the bowl in multiple stalls for almost half the day.||My partner and I contracted gastro staying here. When I called the front office to inform them so they could notify others stating there in case there were young kids or immunocompromised visitors staying there.||The man who answered offered no apology, no concern for our health and said it was not his park it was something we ate that made us sick. Considering we didn’t eat the same thing at all while we were there makes that incredibly unlikely.||100% avoid staying here! Cotton Tree is much cleaner and nicer!

I would give this place a zero if I could.  The women’s toilets had poo smeared in the bowl in multiple stalls for almost half the day.

My partner and I contracted gastro staying here. When I called the front office to inform them so they could notify others stating there in case there were young kids or immunocompromised visitors staying there.

The man who answered offered no apology, no concern for our health and said it was not his park it was something we ate that made us sick. Considering we didn’t eat the same thing at all while we were there makes that incredibly unlikely.

100% avoid staying here! Cotton Tree is much cleaner and nicer!
It's perfectly positioned on the beach and across the road from local shops. There are bus stops nearby as well.
Beautiful spot right next to the beach! Heaps of caravan and camping spots plus some cabins. Lovely location, cafes, fish and chips, and shops just across the road.
We had a lovely stay with you in our caravan. Your amenities are very well maintained and the location is wonderful. Loved the pizza night.
Great location right by the the beach and some local restaurants / IGA. Good, clean facilities and plenty of them (bathrooms, laundry, BBQ areas)
A great spot to bring your caravan and relax for a day or longer. Steps to the beach, restaurants and tourist activities.
Great, clean facilities and grounds. Reasonable rate. Great communication

Always a great place for a holiday or weekend getaway,
Staff are friendly, park is clean and tidy....and large.
Seems dodgy

We are full time travellers and we always come to Dickey Beach when we need to just relax. This park is always immaculate, Peter, his family & staff are amazing, they work hard and it shows. The park is right on the beach yet it’s still quiet. I highly recommend a stay here, its our favourite 🌊
Great location, family friendly
Excellent campground. Good clean facilities with spacious camp sites in a beautiful location with good value for money |Well managed
Right next to the beach, large caravan sites with all amenities, park and surf club near by - excellent

Used the caravan park not the accomodation cabins. Clean and well catered for familiies, facilities. Walk to the beach and  a short walk along paths both north and south. Overall, a great place to stay.
Great location, friendly staff, pool, tennis courts, play area for the kids......... What's not to like 👍
Hidden gem on the Sunshine Coast. Direct beach access, good clean facilities, very secure with night time security guard on patrol.

Prime location. Great park with shops handy. Protected beach. Surf club, skatepark. Very popular during holidays of course. I'd love a bigger pool or a second pool but overall amenities are good. Big clean showers get a tick ✅
Trotz der, unserer Meinung nach,  wenigen Sanitäranlagen ein hervorragender Caravan Park. Toller Stellplatz, sehr sauber und ordentlich. Direkt am Beach gelegen, für Familien gut geeignet.
Nice spot good location plenty of room for the caravan
Good location
Great holiday park everything is so close and handy.
Its a good place.
Loved this caravan park. It was green & very clean & close to cafes & restaurants. Right near the beach as well.

Such a beautiful peaceful clean place to stay we booked a space for 3 nights we were up the back could hear the beach a nice stroll to the beach as well we parked our van under a tree .
We definitely will be back even with the storm coming we were notified via text ,thank you so much Renee we had an amazing break already looking forward to coming back .Robyn and Brett .I.

The staff are friendly and helpful and the park is in the perfect position for the beach. The sites are big with plenty of room to move and park your car.  Totally recommend dicky beach holiday Park 👌🏾
Another great September week at Dicky Beach Caravan Park! Amenities always clean, water always hot, and the friendships always warm! Location +++
Great location for caravan park, close to beach and the coastal walking track

We stayed on a powered caravan site. The facilities are fantastic, immaculately clean and very well maintained.  The pool looked clean and inviting, however the weather wasn't warm enough for me to go swimming. The park's close proximity to the beach, IGA, Chemist, the Surf club and cafes catering for all dietary needs made for a stress free, relaxed and enjoyable holiday.  This was a return visit and we'll definitely be back!
lol dicky

家族で日本の友人を訪ねた。
素晴らしい場所と人達、そして何より朝日🌅が素晴らしかった。
万国共通で心身ともにリフレッシュできる場所✨

Great place to live Great beach & surf camp grounds well maintained. Just have to watch out for kids playing & riding their bikes. Only downfall is having campers & kids riding in our residential area when they're not allowed to... especially the e-scooters who go too fast through our area. Signs are posted on the road. Driving vehicles too fast especially through the Residents area. This involves some NON RESIDENTS & RESIDENTS remember 10km please think of others. ONCE AGAIN CAMPERS NO RIDING THROUGH THE RESIDENTS ILL NOTIFY MANAGEMENT RESIDENTS AREA ESPECIALLY E SHOOTERS. IF I SEE IF I SEE ONE ILL REPORT TO THE OFFICE  & BIKES 🤬... still having people driving through where the residents live going to fast including Tradies & visitors, slow down before someone is either injured or killed 🤬
Very good

Amazing experience from the time I checked in to the check out the staff were super friendly, park was clean and tidy.  Security roamed the park of a night time which gave a sense of safety and cabin were perfect.
Nice campground with a great location. Close to shop and eateries,close to buses and the beach
Excellent Park positioned right beside the beach, surf club and shops. Average camp kitchen and playground but location makes up for it!
Great place!! Quiet!! Cages and shops across the road!!

Great park, managers Peter and Marie continuely maintain all park grounds, sites, ammenities to A1 standards. Very approachable and will also try to resolve any issues within the park precinct. This is now our 10th year at this park.
Great Park, hosts Peter and Marie maintain all grounds, sites and amenities to a high standard. Always happy to assist with any issues
We had an overnight stay to attend an Opera. Prices are reasonable and the booking staff were very helpful. The spectrum of camping is available and plenty of facilities.
Good park amenities fairly good
Really lovely caravan park. Close to beach and shops.

Was a really nice stay, good amenities and Service. Sadly that the prices are increas every time.
Thanks

We recently stayed for 7 days. Really great location, right on the beach and good to launch off to visit other attractions along with the Glass House Mountains and Mountains. ||Really close to numerous shopping venues. ||While the park was busy, we didn’t feel blocked in and it is a quiet park. ||Amenities are clean.  Awesome camp kit he and very well equipped. ||We are pretty experienced at reversing our van and had a little bit of a challenge getting our van in to the bay.  Talking around, as you do in parks, there were others.  But that is just a minor.   ||Overall good base point.  ||Also with the amount of trees around the boarder of the park means it breaks up any wind. Great for the awnings.

We have just stayed here for a week. Nice clean park with a great location to beaches and launch off to visit Glass House Mountains and other attractions.

Really quiet and while busy didn’t have that over crowded feel.

Little tight getting our van in and talking to a few others they were the same.

But nothing negative.

Great visit.
Found it to be a clean and well run park

Loved my stay at Dicky Beach Family Holiday Park! 🌴💛

The amenities are massive and super clean – always a win when you’re camping 🚿🙌 Shower pressure could definitely be better, but everything else was spot on.
Staff were so lovely and helpful, made the whole vibe feel really welcoming 😊
Beach is just a hop, skip and a jump away – ideal for a morning swim or arvo chill 🌊☀️

Also handy being right next to Dicky Beach Surf Club – good food, live music and a relaxed atmosphere. Shame they don’t do pints, but the staff were super friendly and accommodating 🍻👍

Would definitely stay again! 🏕️

Stayed in a Beachfront Powered Van Site last week, actually I think we had the best spot in the park.  We paid a bit extra for it, but totally worth it.  A beautiful view of the beach, walking distance to the beach, Surf Club & other restaurants, IGA & bottle shop.  The perfect location.  The Manager is very friendly and helpful.  We loved it so much we extended an extra night, could have stayed longer if we didn't have to leave.  Will definitely be returning.  Thankyou for a lovely stay.

When we arrived gentlemen was quite abrupt wasn’t trying to explain to us the extra charge just matter of fact that we had to pay it also had an extra car which we new couldn’t be parked inside caravan park and I just asked if it would be safe he was quite abrupt saying well his car is outside so my car would be
Caravan holiday. Spacious sites.

Great spot right on the beach, plenty of cafes and food options close by !!
Friendly accomodating staff !!

When we arrived we had a concrete slap spot in the sun, fortunately the staff member at reception was kind enough to change us to a wonderful spot under the trees instead. It was very nice and we were able to extend for another 2 nights. Very well set up Caravan park, sitting and reading room, game room, good washing machines (credit card) plenty of washing lines,good BBQ/kitchen area, clean and good amenities.  Access to the beach area. Opposite of the road good Thai restaurant, coffee shops and IGA. The staff member at reception on Saturday gave us lovely ideas to visit. Friendly and helpful staff. We had a wonderful time.
Great location and helpful, friendly staff.

Dicky Beach family holiday caravan park is by far the best caravan park. My family stayed at Pete and the crew were accommodating. They look after the park with pride and they care about their patience. I highly recommend these guys as the beach is At your doorstep as well as a local Grocery and BWS

Upon checkin I walked into the office to overhear an older gentleman and younger blonde woman behind the desk gossiping about other staff which was appalling, checkin was overwhelming and they kept talking non stop but did not give me clear instruction about the park. The man looked grumpy and like it was an inconvenience for me being there as well as the blonde lady just being rude when I had any questions. Also, they never answer the phone so don’t expect much in terms of customer service.
Managers do a great job..and staff too very friendly and welcoming...shops, cafes across the road.

Great caravan park located on the beach. The beach is patrolled by the Dicky Beach Surf Life Saving Club.

There is a Rec Room, Pool and Tennis Court within the park.

The park is quiet and peaceful as the adjacent road is not that busy.

Foodstore, restaurants and fish and chip shops are located across the road and surf club is next to caravan park.

9.5/10
Would recommend.
Great location, spaceous sites, excellent staff, this is a well maintained park super close to the shops, beach and surf club. Looking forward to our next stay. Highly recommended.
We stayed several times at this caravan park and always recommend it to visiting family and friends. Great location and amenities.
We camped in the motor home. Park is well set out, clean, tidy, and spacious. Close to most shops and a quick walk to the beach.

What a fantastic place to stay with fabulous amenities and so close to Dicky beach, only a carpark away. Always quiet and peaceful with many full-grown trees to provide shade for your camping needs. The amenities are clean, and the BBQ area and playground are right next to each other, so you can really watch your kids while you cook, making it a more than enjoyable experience. There is a pool on-site as well. With security codes for entry and exit, you can be assured that the park is secure. Unfortunately, though, this park, due to council regulations, is not animal friendly unless you have service dogs, and then it is one only. Please make sure they wear their uniform. Otherwise, this is one of the best parks on the southern end of the Sunshine Coast, and the owners are very friendly and easy to talk to. Bookings are just a phone call away. The SS Dicky remnants are still on the beach for now, I suggest seeing her before she is removed for safety of the public, also for council standards. The Dicky Beach Surf Club is very close and access can be gained through a coded gate in the middle of the park. There is a range of shops including an IGA, fish n chips, bakery, various takeouts and cafes across the road. What a gem!

Amazing Venue! Could not fault it. Clean camp site, facilities and in the prime spot. Beach just over the dunes and amazing restaurants across the road. We will be back in no time. Thanks for the beautiful holiday & amazing service from all the staff.
Thanks Pete for the great hospitality.  Facilities were clean and family friendly park. See you again.

Rude lady running the place. Only replies to emails she wants and pretends the phone lines are down so she doesn’t have to talk to people.

As for your dog policy - you need a better website when booking. It does not clearly state ‘dicky beach caravan park no dogs’
I’m not from here, I actually have no idea what your dog policy means. Still don’t

Do better

Edited to add photo: It does not say No dogs at Dicky Beach caravan park. I was unaware that this rule sheet is for multiple caravan parks.

Also you didn’t reply to 3 of my emails or the phone so nice try but multiple people have complained about your inability to ‘help’ or be a kind person so that’s on you :)

Nice to see you can answer this within an hour of it being posted but you can’t answer the phone. Thank you for proving my point

We have been staying in a cabin every year for the 10 years. Unfortunately due to two price hikes, it is no longer value for money. Cost of cabin was $760 a week, now $1200 for low/shoulder season. Renting a house across the road for $950 next year. Small cooktop that is tricky to cook on if you have both hot plates going. No counter space. Although cabins were refurbed with a lick of paint and a few Kmart mirrors and pics it’s not worth $1200. Still old and tired.
Caravan park atmosphere is great! So close to the beach which is patrolled. Location is perfect 🙌

Great spot to go camping. Right on the beach. We love it. Never stayed in the cabins so can’t comment.
Whole park is always clean and tidy.
Lovely caravan park close to the beach and some local shops and restaurants. Very clean amenities and beautifully kept grounds.
Lovely walk along the beach, although not sure about the safety of swimming there

Recently spent 7 nights here, half of which I was staying here alone. The park felt very safe, even with it being so open to the public. I really enjoyed how easy and quick it was to get to the beach, and the shops across the road are so convenient. The park is very clean, and bathrooms well cared for. Thoroughly enjoyed staying here, and will be back again.

Side note: if you’re planning on staying here, it’s worth heading down to the beach after dark to watch the stars and ships, and in the morning for sunrise. The beach is incredibly quiet and peaceful at these times 👌🏼
location location location and staff !
Caravan sites are great, amenities very clean and location of park is fabulous.

Firstly the park itself was well looked after, clean amenities blocks, minute walk to beach and great pool area. However very open to public which is were we experienced an incident with a lady entering the park trying to lure child out, taking photos and video of the children. Police were called. Very concerning as this lady was an employee from business across the road. Disappointing with owners/ management after knowing about this incident occured still didn't visit our sites or reach out to check in.
To close to city and streets

We stayed here for a week and found the location perfect. Clean facilities and friendly staff. Great place to relax and with shops and beach so close you can pull up and loose your car keys for a week and not notice.

Beautiful spot for a weekend getaway or an extended stay. Everything is clean and tidy and it is a minute walk from the beach. Definitely coming back. We stayed here so we could go for a 20 minute drive to Mooloolaba for a whale watching tour.

Such a great  park
Very well maintained by friendly staff
Amenities  always clean
Pool always sparkling
We will be back next year
John and Ann Pointer

Just another overcrowded, overpriced Sunshine Coast caravan park.
Thought it was beautiful in 2018 - How this part of the country has changed.
We stay in our caravan in this park. Close to the beach and shops across the road. Clean amenities. Overall a great park
Tidy, easily accessed sites for the caravan. Close to shops and the beach.

after 6 months traveling in the caravan this is the 2nd CP we've stayed at. lovely spot, heaps for families to do. if you're staying in the winter months id ask for a site not shaded by trees , also will improve the TV reception lol

Grounds and amenities spotless||Staff friendly and accommodating ||Perfect location to beach, surf club, massage, pharmacy etc ||Council have supplied fantastic footpaths/bikepaths there is even a skate park for the kiddies out the front of the park

Caravan site..Good location but queue for the toilets if you have a site at the rear of the park. Only 3 cubicles in the men's for 75 sites. Not nearly enough.... and 1 was out of order for a week. Whole thing felt busy and cramped.
Really nice caravan park close to the beach. Swimming pool, camp kitchen, games room, tennis court. Friendly staff and helpful reception. Highly recommend

A husband and wife travelling through as they visit their children and grandchildren - stayed at this family park for 2 nights . It is a. Dry clean and tidy place that is well kept .  Wry close to the beach , shops and a surf club . The beach has lifeguards and a great walking path to both north and south . The camp has a pool and pretty good family rooms / entertainment area. Mainly for caravans but some small cabins / units

We have been coming here for many years and loved it but unfortunately we will never be coming back because of the new pricing thanks to council.  Total rip off for a little patch of grass, a little power and a little water.
A very scenic & convenient holiday spot
Great park to visit..the front service when we arrived was exceptional..the amenities block was spotless..very first timers with a van ..everything was made easy
Well kept and maintained, direct access to beach and parkland. Shops across road. Loved this place.
Camping très agréable sanitaires propres , accès direct à la plage . Personnes a l'accueil très aimables et serviables je recommande vivement cet endroit
The girls in the office are very helpful we had a big slab site near the amenities which was great however paid $131 for 2 nights for a powered caravan site was a bit exspensive

So worried, the website said you don't get to park your car on your site. We got there and it's not as bad as it sounds, there is allocated parking space right next to the unpowered sites, within a hop, skip, jump, it's more cozy and neighbourly this way. Fantastic park for children!!! The surf club right next door for super dooper great meals! And such a nice beach and skate park!

Ganze Anlage sauber und gepflegt. Erfrischender & sauberer Pool mit schönen Sitzgelegenheiten. Badezimmer sauber.

Stellplätze mit Strom sind sehr klein und somit sehr nahe bei den Nachbarn. Diese Plätze haben zudem keinen Schatten.

NP-Sites sind schön schattig unter Eucalyptusbäumen gelegen.

80Dollar pro Nacht für Motorhome mit 1 Kind ist eher teuer

Up date on my review from 5 years ago all ok now showers are fine had a lovely dtay last year   so dis regard the following

Lovely big park well kept large clean amenities BUT !! THE OWNERS OR MANAGERS SHOULD TRY!!!! using the shower are horrible small head so close to the wall you need to be a gecko to get wet . So difficult to use. Lots of pressure and hot water you just cannot wet.had problem getting soap out of my hair and i hardly have any. All else in this park is perfect .

2 nights in Caravan, double slab was very nice as the grass was very wet after all the rain.  Amenity we used were good
Would definitely stay here again ❤️
Disappointed no dogs allowed
Great Caravan park, clean amenities,  cool games room..Close to beach, state park, and park for the kids..Local shops and Cafe across the road...😍
Always feel relaxed,  kids can wonder without stress & really is fantastic. Is close to the beach & shops.
Amenities are very clean and well maintained and park close to beach ,surf club and shops and cafe.
It's not a hotel Google, it's a campground. As a campground it is brilliant.

Great location, site, amenities, service!
Plenty of space on a powered slab site, local shops across the road, patrolled beach, on site swimming pool and very clean bathrooms!
Nice campground with everything right there. Nice and clean too.

Our circumstances required us to stay somewhere for a few weeks and I'm overjoyed and so greatful for the option to stay at Dicky Beach Caravan park. We have loved every day so far. The staff are so accommodating. They have looked after us and I will forever be grateful. My young children and I use the amenities multiple times everyday and it's always clean and looked after I have stayed at hotels in worse conditions! Even the gardens and driveways are cleaned regularly.
We've left items behind without knowing and they were there the next day. Best experience we've ever had. Thankyou to everyone who helps pull it all together. Can't wait to come back.
Great location, great facilities thoroughly enjoyed it

Relative to price, this ticks all the boxes. Excellent value for money, beds comfortable, good quality linen, had the essentials, ( maybe I would suggest to BYO clothes horse) and the management and staff helpful, warm and friendly. We didn’t need to use the car once  there, everything we needed was within walking distance. Pool was lovely, also our cabin was nice and quiet.

Stayed on a unpowered site. What a beautiful park. Lots of Amenities blocks. Games room. Fantastic camp kitchen, and a stove! Surf club, at the back! Beaches are beautiful and we are that close. Butchers,  bakery,  iga, chemist, etc across the Rd. Tennis courts, swimming pool. Reception is amazing and very friendly.  Highly recommended 👌

Almost impossible to book over the phone. Been ringing for days with no one answering. The website is not helpful for what we need. Not very good customer service when you can only talk or interact with computers. What a joke!

We stayed in a villa beside the pool.  It was pristine clean and had everything we needed for two adults and two kids.  We loved the access to the beach and walking distance to the shops.  Staff were friendly and amenities were well kept in a peak period.
Good clean amenities. Good service

Nice park very clean amenities tennis court pool and direct access to the beach.
Just be careful of the semi permanents. One in particular was very nasty. This has left a sour taste to not come back.
What a lovely park in a perfect location!  The staff were all super friendly and polite.  The facilities were always cleaned and maintained to a very high standard.  We will return

Great caravan parks, you can walk on the beach  there shops a cross the road . . You can  see 🐸 frog and the sufe club room next to the park .you can go have a meal.  Nice  big clean showed and tolets to
Satisfactory cabin. Bed poorly positioned but comfortable. Staff very welcoming.

Within 2 minutes of arriving, the groundskeeper was disrespectful and sexist. Told us we had “attitude” when we were simply calm and firm, which he’d never say to a man. Ruined our entire experience with his belittling and rudeness.||We are two almost 30-year-old women camping in a van, towing a tinny. We called the park the day before to book, and made sure our site would accommodate our vehicle & tow. When we checked in at reception we confirmed this again - a drive-on, unpowered site. The lady at reception even marked on our map that we could leave the tinny in front of our site, off the road.||As we unhitched the tinny & started to push it in place, a groundskeeper asked if we needed help. We both replied no thank you, as we’ve done the task many times. He seemed to take offence to being ‘rejected’ and said “well you can’t put it there, this is all parking space for tent campers.” Despite just offering to help us park it there…||I told him we had been told to put the tinny there by reception. He then went further, saying that we shouldn’t be on our allocated site at all, because it *wasnt* drive-on. I told him that we’d been given that site by the other staff, knowing our need for drive-on access. He said we were wrong; I had to repeat myself multiple times before he said he would “call to sort this out”.||He came back, but despite reception obviously confirming that we *were* on a drive-on site, he grumbled about us “maybe being parked in” by tent campers cars. He did not apologise, admit he was wrong, or provide any reassurance about our site.||We were spoken to like naive 16-year-old teens by the 50s-something groundskeeper. He spoke down to us, and didn’t listen to us. When we continued to be firm and assertive (“this is the site we were given, other staff knew our vehicles, they told us to put the tinny here”) he said “there’s no need for the attitude.”||He would never have said that to a 40-year-old man. Just because we are women he decided our assertiveness was “attitude.” That’s sexism, folks.||We also said, multiple times, that we were happy to put the tinny on the site - we had just started to put it at the front as directed by the reception staff. We did in the end put the tinny on the site.||Went to speak to reception about it on our departure, but it seemed the groundskeeper was working the desk that day.||Very disappointing & upsetting as our first experience with the park; to have come in, been greeted so nicely at reception, and then 2 minutes later have this man belittle, disregard, and ‘scold’ us for doing exactly what we had been told to do.

Within 2 minutes of arriving, the groundskeeper was disrespectful and sexist. Told us we had “attitude” when we were simply calm and firm, which he’d never say to a man. Ruined our entire experience with his belittling and rudeness.

We are two almost 30-year-old women camping in a van, towing a tinny. We called the park the day before to book, and made sure our site would accommodate our vehicle & tow. When we checked in at reception we confirmed this again - a drive-on, unpowered site. The lady at reception even marked on our map that we could leave the tinny in front of our site, off the road.

As we unhitched the tinny & started to push it in place, a groundskeeper asked if we needed help. We both replied no thank you, as we’ve done the task many times. He seemed to take offence to being ‘rejected’ and said “well you can’t put it there, this is all parking space for tent campers.” Despite just offering to help us park it there…

I told him we had been told to put the tinny there by reception. He then went further, saying that we shouldn’t be on our allocated site at all, because it *wasnt* drive-on. I told him that we’d been given that site by the other staff, knowing our need for drive-on access. He said we were wrong; I had to repeat myself multiple times before he said he would “call to sort this out”.

He came back, but despite reception obviously confirming that we *were* on a drive-on site, he grumbled about us “maybe being parked in” by tent campers cars. He did not apologise, admit he was wrong, or provide any reassurance about our site.

We were spoken to like naive 16-year-old teens by the 50s-something groundskeeper. He spoke down to us, and didn’t listen to us. When we continued to be firm and assertive (“this is the site we were given, other staff knew our vehicles, they told us to put the tinny here”) he said “there’s no need for the attitude.”

He would never have said that to a 40-year-old man. Just because we are women he decided our assertiveness was “attitude.” That’s sexism, folks.

We also said, multiple times, that we were happy to put the tinny on the site - we had just started to put it at the front as directed by the reception staff. We did in the end put the tinny on the site.

Went to speak to reception about it on our departure, but it seemed the groundskeeper was working the desk that day. He may even be the manager, which would be quite disappointing.

Very upsetting as our first experience with the park; to have come in, been greeted so nicely at reception, and then 2 minutes later have this man belittle, disregard, and ‘scold’ us for doing exactly what we had been told to do.

Thank you to all the staff at Dicky Beach holiday park. We had a great week and would like to thank the staff and management for everything they have done to make our stay so enjoyable. Whilst keeping peace and order, you were friendly on, no unreasonable rules, amenities clean, large sites, great school holiday activities and food vans on site. Loved the friendly worded text messages and reminders too. Our kids felt safe the whole time and made so many friends. We had a refund to process too where we over paid for our kids accidentally. You were so great to deal with and professional. Would highly recommend to any families that want to relax and let the kids have a great time too.
Just wish we booked more time,excellent condition, park.will be returning.
Great park. Very clean and tidy. Camp kitchen with working bbq and stove with oven. No dogs wow!

Good place to stay. you need to book well in advance. Clean amenities and well maintained sites. Not really a kids park as caravan parks go these days, but if the beach is all you require then its great. but they do have tennis courts and a small pool as well.They  also have a reasonable little shopping centre across the road
Love this spot.  I can hear the surf rolling in from my caravan.  Lovely grassy spots and clean amenities.

View of the beach from our powered site, was a really lovely addition to our one night pit stop.
Clean toilets and kitchen areas.
Busy camp site.
Amazing location! Short stroll to the beach.

Cabins are very small with no indoor seating - equivalent to a small hotel room. Lovely and clean. However, I wouldn't recommend for any more than 2.
Park, staff and location were great.
Great spot to drag your caravan or tent large sites with all you need for a great stay

An exceptional caravan park in paradise. The best customer service staff I have come across in "all our travels around Australia" Situated next to the beach. Nice quiet caravan park which is very clean. The amenities are clean as. All other facilities are in impeccable condition. Piping hot showers & has very clean BBQ kitchen areas. This place is a gem with shops across the road for coffee, dining breakfast lunch & dinner. Local food trucks coming into the park to offer dinners. The surf club is right beside the park as well & they cater for all your needs from  icy cold beer to exceptional food menus. Who needs the crowds when this beautiful small caravan park ticks all the boxes. I highly recommend this to everyone wanting everything from a caravan park with no fuss at all & small crowds. Thank you to the owners who have helped out whilst my wife was taken to hospital. Greatly appreciated indeed..

Location is great. Close to beach and shops. But the managers have been becoming more and more unfriendly in the past few years. Shady trees are being removed so no shade over campsites. Grass is slowly being replaced by road base.
We used to love this place but with the local kids stealing and the lack of security, we have decided to call it and stay elsewhere.
A lovely family holiday destination.

As a long-term resident  i have nothing but praise for the managers of this park.They are curtious,professional and helpful to residents  & travellers alike.I have enjoyed and will continue to enjoy my life here.
